headline: Is the Iran conflict a tactical buying opportunity?
summary: Robinhood (HOOD) chief investment officer Stephanie Guild joins Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi to discuss whether the escalated conflict in Iran offers investors value in the markets (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) right now. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

headline: Strategy, Coinbase, and Robinhood Stocks Surge. This Market Is Getting Weirder.
summary: Strategy Coinbase  and  Robinhood  stocks are, in fact, among the best performers in premarket trading.  Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 6% and trading platform Robinhood was 4% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.

headline: Coinbase, Other Crypto Stocks Surge. What’s Behind the Rally.
summary: Strategy Coinbase  and  Robinhood  stocks are, in fact, among the best performers.  Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7.8%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 9.6% and trading platform Robinhood was 5.6% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.
